name: F5, INC.
business: F5 is a multicloud application delivery and security provider. It sells packaged software in perpetual, subscription, and usage-based consumption models, as well as SaaS, managed services, high-performance systems, and global services including maintenance, consulting, and training. Its customers include large enterprise businesses, public sector institutions, governments, and service providers.

exposures.sentence: F5 is a multicloud application delivery and security provider.
our current portfolio is solving security and performance challenges associated with AI model training and inference and in support of AI-driven workloads.
It is optimized for traditional applications whether deployed on premises, in co-located data centers, or in cloud environments.

We sell application delivery and security solutions for web application and API protection, hybrid multicloud networking, enterprise AI delivery and security, application migration, application modernization, zero trust architecture and post quantum cryptography readiness.
Our customers include large enterprise businesses, public sector institutions, governments, and service providers.

catalysts.sentence: On October 15, 2025, we disclosed a security incident in which a threat actor maintained long-term, persistent access to F5 systems, and exfiltrated certain files, referred to as the 'Cyber Incident.'
In September 2025, we completed the acquisition of CalypsoAI Corp.

In the first and fourth fiscal quarters of 2025, and the first fiscal quarter of 2024, we completed restructuring plans to better align strategic and financial objectives, optimize operations, and drive efficiencies for long-term growth and profitability.
On January 31, 2025, the Revolving Credit Facility expired.

catalysts.event: One Big Beautiful Bill Act enactment
catalysts.sentence: On July 4, 2025, the One Big Beautiful Bill Act ("OBBBA") was enacted into law.

catalysts.event: Introduction of F5 Application Delivery and Security Platform
catalysts.sentence: in 2025 we introduced the F5 Application Delivery and Security Platform ("ADSP").
